sections.title: Before starting The Heart of Darkness

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: Nilsal, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, Itzla. How are things going?

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: Father should make a full recovery, though given that his would-be killers are still out there, that's not anywhere near as much comfort as it should be.

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: I'm also still yet to hear from mother, but in the meantime, I've been thinking about what our next move should be. I don't have anything solid yet, but I'm sure I will soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In that case, I'll make sure to keep checking in.

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: I've sent word to mother about what happened here, but I've not heard back yet. However, in the meantime, I've devised a little plan for how we might go about dealing with our cultist problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: We're going to go... undercover!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Undercover? What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: The Twilight Emissaries of course! If they are the ones responsible for what is now two attempts on my father's life, their deaths will be swift and brutal.

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: However, given we're somewhat civilised people, we can't exactly start executing cultists without definitive proof. How do we get that? By joining up of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You want us to join the cult?

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: Exactly! Quite a clever plan, if I do say so myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right...

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Prepare for the arrival of Queen Zyanyi Arkan!

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: Ah... This should be fun.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd love to hear it, but I have some things I need to do first.

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: Very well. I'll be here when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, Itzla.

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: Nilsal, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you doing?

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: Well, now that the local cult of murderers is no longer trying to kill me or my father, I'd say things are looking up.

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: I'm also finding I've got a bit more time on my hands now that things are all sorted. I suggested to mother I spend that time in the Colosseum. I don't know if she was totally convinced.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't imagine why...

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: Anyway, I won't keep you, iknami. I'm sure you've got plenty more adventures to go on. Timoiva, my friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't happen to have another sword do you?

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: I'm afraid not, iknami. You'll have to go and find where you left the one I gave you. I'm sure you won't have lost it. After it, it's a one of a kind family heirloom.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... yes... I'll go see if I can find it.

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: Well, iknami, as luck would have it, someone came along trying to sell a sword that perfectly matches the one I gave you. He claimed he just found it on the ground!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How odd...

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: Indeed. I'm sure it can't be the same one. After all, that was a one of a kind family heirloom, so you'd definitely have taken good care of it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah... definitely...

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: Anyway, I had to pay 250,000 coins to buy this one, so if you want it, that's how much I'll have to charge you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, I don't have enough. I'll be back shortly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds good to me.

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: Use it well, iknami.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll pass.

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: As you wish, iknami.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get going.

lines.speaker: Prince Itzla Arkan
lines.text: Timoiva, my friend.
